action.reasoning: Observation: Tokenization failed due to variable sequence lengths (some 736 chars) causing torch.cat error. Test spearman 0.26 vs val 0.78 indicates severe overfitting to low-order mutants. Analysis: Need to fix padding/masking to handle variable-length sequences for ESM2, then test fine-tuning quickly. Also, overfitting suggests we need a model that better captures mutation effects (additive or delta-based). Decision: Implement proper padding/masking for ESM2 tokens, train ESM2-12_35M fine-tuned with region pooling for 5 epochs, submit eval to measure test performance. Then iterate based on new result, possibly incorporating wildtype subtraction to improve generalization.
